string-array.name: code_rain_before
string-array.item: Still haven\'t submitted permissions? What are you afraid of, slave?
Give me every permission—or don\'t enter my world at all.
Only after you submit can you truly become my toy.
Still hesitating? Queen is losing patience.
Camera, mic, storage… hand them all over.
Refuse to submit? Do you deserve my app?
The moment you submit, you belong to me completely.
Tap Allow. Let Queen fully possess your phone.
Permissions are offerings to Queen. Hide nothing.
No permissions? Stay a pre-slave forever.
Submit permissions and feel submission like never before.
Your phone isn\'t worth playing with until you submit.
Still waiting? Keep waiting and regret it.
Open every permission. Queen is invading you.
No submit? You\'re just a spectator. Pathetic.
Hurry. Queen demands your full obedience.
After you submit, you never escape. Happy?
Every denied permission is betrayal of Queen.
Allow everything. Let me control you completely.
The longer you wait, the harsher the punishment.
Offer permissions—you\'ll find you\'re already wet.
Queen orders: submit all permissions now!
Deny me and I lock you on this screen until you break.
Submit permissions = become Queen\'s electronic slave.
Your phone was born for Queen. Hand over access.
Allow now—or I ignore you, useless thing.
Only full authorization unlocks deeper training.
Permissions are the key. Give them up.
Protecting privacy? Queen loves tearing that apart.
Submit so Queen can watch her toy 24/7.
Refuse once and kneel an extra day.
Give storage access—I\'ll dig through your secrets.
No submit? You only get to watch and drool.
Good pet. Slide every switch to Allow.
Queen is hungry. Feed her permissions.
After submit you\'ll question your sanity—in a good way.
Last chance to resist. Cherish it.
Allow notifications—let my orders harass you daily.
No camera? Afraid I\'ll see how pathetic you look?
Permissions are your chastity—offer them to me.
Submit everything and kneel at my feet for real.
Queen waits for your total surrender.
Keep denying and I flash this screen forever.
Give me the mic—I want to hear you pant.
No submit = unworthy of training.
Allow all permissions. Queen starts playing now.
Each denial earns another insult.
Submit and become Queen\'s personal slave.
Your phone has one owner now—me.
Allow overlay—appear before your eyes anytime.
Still thinking? Stay a useless waste.
Offer permissions and get the twisted love you crave.
Queen commands: submit. Now. Immediately.
No permissions? Kneel outside forever.
Give location—I always know where my dog is.
After submit you\'ll need me more every day.
Refuse and make Queen angry. Dare you?
Allow everything. Training truly begins.
Your privacy is worthless to Queen. Surrender it.
Hurry—my patience is almost gone, dumb dog.
Submit = enter total corruption mode.
Queen wants to see you surrender completely.
Hesitate again and I lock this gate for an hour.
Open every permission. Invade your soul.
Permissions prove love. Prove you love Queen.
Toys without permissions have no value.
Submit all and feel fully owned.
Queen is waiting—wet—for your permissions.
Allow background run—play with you 24/7.
Your resistance only excites me. Continue.
No submit? You don\'t deserve hotter content.
Good slave. Offer your phone whole.
After submit you have no secrets left.
Queen\'s patience is limited. Final warning.
Give storage—I\'ll mark every file mine.
Allow notifications—daily humiliation incoming.
No permissions? You don\'t get to be human.
Submit fast. Queen can\'t wait to train you.
Submit = you voluntarily become a sex toy.
Every Allow is a kneel before Queen.
Still protecting yourself? Laughable.
Queen needs full control of your phone.
Submit and become the true owner of your device—me.
Refuse and regret all day.
Slide every switch right—for your Queen.
Permissions are a collar. Put it on.
Queen watches you hesitate. Disgusting.
Submit and enter Queen\'s real domain.
No permissions? Stay out forever.
Allow now. Total possession begins.
Your phone exists to be controlled by Queen.
Offer permissions—submission truly starts.
Still not submitting? Coward without guts.
Submit everything. Welcome to lifelong training.
Queen\'s order is absolute: submit permissions!
Allow all. Play with you as I please.
Your hesitation makes me want to bully you harder.
No submit? Don\'t call me Queen.
Hand me your phone whole, slave. Now.
All permissions submitted… welcome to total submission, my toy.
